rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. FOX et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 06, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Goodyear Tire and Rubber Company¿s motion to reopen limited discovery. It appears that the parties may have resolved some of the issues raised by the motion. At their option, plaintiffs shall either provide defendants with an updated economic report or make Dr. Barry Ben-Zion available for another deposition. Hearing required as to any other issues in dispute. = (220/HEK)
